creator: efklid@gmail.com
text:
Problem at start havp - get an error: LibClamAV Error: Can not load /var/db/clamav/daily.cvd: Can not allocate memory
Thus itself ClanAV normally starts and updated. The error only occurs when trying to start havp.
#
service havp start
    Starting havp.
    Starting HAVP Version: 0.91
    Mandatory locking disabled! KEEPBACK settings not used!
    LibClamAV Error: Can't load /var/db/clamav/daily.cvd: Can't allocate memory
    One or more scanners failed to initialize!
    Check errorlog for errors.
    Exiting..
    /usr/local/etc/rc.d/havp: WARNING: failed to start havp
#
